---
title: "Juncheng Zhang"
description-meta: "Juncheng Zhang, PhD Candidate in Economics at the University of Nottingham Ningbo China"
image: "files/images/profile.svg"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
page-layout: full

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image: "files/images/profile.svg"
  image-width: 68%
  links:
    - icon: globe
      text: UNNC
      href: https://www.nottingham.edu.cn/
      target: _blank
    - icon: sun
      text: CeDEx China
      href: https://cedex-china.github.io/
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-mail
      href: mailto:Juncheng.ZHANG@nottingham.edu.cn
---

:::{#hero-heading}

I am a PhD Candidate in Economics at the [University of Nottingham Ningbo China](https://www.nottingham.edu.cn/) and a member of [CeDEx China](https://cedex-china.github.io/).

My research interests are in experimental and behavioural economics, especially how people's self-perception shapes decision-making. I am interested in how individuals interpret information about themselves, how they respond to ego-relevant uncertainty, and how these psychological forces affect search, effort, and economic choices.

:::
